---
title: "throwError()"
description: "Terminate with ERROR on activation."
---

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Terminate with ERROR on activation.

## Import

```ts
import { throwError } from "@graphrefly/ts/sources";
```

## Signature

```ts
function throwError(err: unknown): Operator<never, never>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `err` | `unknown` | Host-language error payload to normalize into a protocol ERROR payload. |

## Returns

A source operator that emits ERROR.

## Example

```ts
import { graph, throwError } from "@graphrefly/ts";

const failed = graph().initNode(throwError(new Error("boom")), []);
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/graph/sources.ts`
